verses.latin_vulgate: Verbum quod vidit Isaias, filius Amos, super Juda et Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַדָּבָר֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר חָזָ֔ה יְשַֽׁעְיָ֖הוּ בֶּן־אָמ֑וֹץ עַל־יְהוּדָ֖ה וִירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The word that Isaiah the son of Amos saw, concerning Juda and Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on se, minkä Jesaia Amotsin poika näki Juudasta ja Jerusalemista.
verses.king_james: The word that Isaiah the son of Amoz saw concerning Judah and Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit in novissimis diebus :  præparatus mons domus Domini  in vertice montium,  et elevabitur super colles ;  et fluent ad eum omnes gentes,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֣ה ׀ בְּאַחֲרִ֣ית הַיָּמִ֗ים נָכ֨וֹן יִֽהְיֶ֜ה הַ֤ר בֵּית־יְהֹוָה֙ בְּרֹ֣אשׁ הֶהָרִ֔ים וְנִשָּׂ֖א מִגְּבָע֑וֹת וְנָהֲר֥וּ אֵלָ֖יו כׇּל־הַגּוֹיִֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And in the last days the mountain of the house of the Lord shall be prepared on the top of mountains, and it shall be exalted above the hills, and all nations shall flow unto it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Viimeisenä aikana pitää sen vuoren, jolla Herran huone on, vahvan oleman, korkiampi kuin kaikki vuoret, ja korotettaman kukkulain ylitse; ja kaikki pakanat pitää sinne juokseman.
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass in the last days, that the mountain of the Lord’s house shall be established in the top of the mountains, and shall be exalted above the hills; and all nations shall flow unto it.

verses.latin_vulgate: et ibunt populi multi, et dicent :  Venite, et ascendamus ad montem Domini,  et ad domum Dei Jacob ;  et docebit nos vias suas,  et ambulabimus in semitis ejus,  quia de Sion exibit lex,  et verbum Domini de Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽהָלְכ֞וּ עַמִּ֣ים רַבִּ֗ים וְאָֽמְרוּ֙ לְכ֣וּ ׀ וְנַעֲלֶ֣ה אֶל־הַר־יְהֹוָ֗ה אֶל־בֵּית֙ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יַעֲקֹ֔ב וְיֹרֵ֙נוּ֙ מִדְּרָכָ֔יו וְנֵלְכָ֖ה בְּאֹרְחֹתָ֑יו כִּ֤י מִצִּיּוֹן֙ תֵּצֵ֣א תוֹרָ֔ה וּדְבַר־יְהֹוָ֖ה מִירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And many people shall go, and say: Come and let us go up to the mountain of the Lord, and to the house of the God of Jacob, and he will teach us his ways, and we will walk in his paths: for the law shall come forth from Sion, and the word of the Lord from Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja paljo kansaa pitää sinne menemän, ja sanoman: tulkaat, astukaamme ylös Herran vuorelle, Jakobin Jumalan huoneeseen, että hän opettais meille teitänsä, ja me vaeltaisimme hänen poluillansa; sillä Zionista on laki tuleva, ja Herran sana Jerusalemista.
verses.king_james: And many people shall go and say, Come ye, and let us go up to the mountain of the Lord, to the house of the God of Jacob; and he will teach us of his ways, and we will walk in his paths: for out of Zion shall go forth the law, and the word of the Lord from Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et judicabit gentes,  et arguet populos multos ;  et conflabunt gladios suos in vomeres,  et lanceas suas in falces.  Non levabit gens contra gentem gladium,  nec exercebuntur ultra ad prælium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁפַט֙ בֵּ֣ין הַגּוֹיִ֔ם וְהוֹכִ֖יחַ לְעַמִּ֣ים רַבִּ֑ים וְכִתְּת֨וּ חַרְבוֹתָ֜ם לְאִתִּ֗ים וַחֲנִיתֽוֹתֵיהֶם֙ לְמַזְמֵר֔וֹת לֹא־יִשָּׂ֨א ג֤וֹי אֶל־גּוֹי֙ חֶ֔רֶב וְלֹֽא־יִלְמְד֥וּ ע֖וֹד מִלְחָמָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And he shall judge the Gentiles, and rebuke many people: and they shall turn their swords into ploughshares, and their spears into sickles: nation shall not lift up sword against nation, neither shall they be exercised any more to war.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän tuomitsee pakanain seassa, ja rankaisee monta kansaa. Silloin heidän pitää miekkansa vannaksi tekemän, ja keihäänsä vikahteeksi; sillä ei yhdenkään kansan pidä toista kansaa vastaan miekkaa nostaman, eikä silleen tottuman sotimaan.
verses.king_james: And he shall judge among the nations, and shall rebuke many people: and they shall beat their swords into plowshares, and their spears into pruninghooks: nation shall not lift up sword against nation, neither shall they learn war any more.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domus Jacob, venite,  et ambulemus in lumine Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֵּ֖ית יַעֲקֹ֑ב לְכ֥וּ וְנֵלְכָ֖ה בְּא֥וֹר יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: O house of Jacob, come ye, and let us walk in the light of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tulkaat, te Jakobin huoneesta, vaeltakaamme Herran valkeudessa.
verses.king_james: O house of Jacob, come ye, and let us walk in the light of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Projecisti enim populum tuum,  domum Jacob,  quia repleti sunt ut olim,  et augeres habuerunt ut Philisthiim,  et pueris alienis adhæserunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י נָטַ֗שְׁתָּה עַמְּךָ֙ בֵּ֣ית יַעֲקֹ֔ב כִּ֤י מָֽלְאוּ֙ מִקֶּ֔דֶם וְעֹנְנִ֖ים כַּפְּלִשְׁתִּ֑ים וּבְיַלְדֵ֥י נׇכְרִ֖ים יַשְׂפִּֽיקוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For thou hast cast off thy people, the house of Jacob: because they are filled as in times past, and have had soothsayers as the Philistines, and have adhered to strange children.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta sinä olet sinun kansas Jakobin huoneen hyljännyt; sillä he rikkovat enemmän kuin itäläiset, ja ovat päiväin valitsiat, niinkuin Philistealaiset, ja sallivat muukalaiset lapset moneksi tulla.
verses.king_james: Therefore thou hast forsaken thy people the house of Jacob, because they be replenished from the east, and are soothsayers like the Philistines, and they please themselves in the children of strangers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Repleta est terra argento et auro,  et non est finis thesaurorum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּמָּלֵ֤א אַרְצוֹ֙ כֶּ֣סֶף וְזָהָ֔ב וְאֵ֥ין קֵ֖צֶה לְאֹצְרֹתָ֑יו וַתִּמָּלֵ֤א אַרְצוֹ֙ סוּסִ֔ים וְאֵ֥ין קֵ֖צֶה לְמַרְכְּבֹתָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Their land is filled with silver and gold: and there is no end of their treasures.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heidän maansa on täynnä hopiaa ja kultaa, ja heidän rikkaudellansa ei ole loppua; heidän maansa on täynnä hevosia, ja heidän rattaillansa ei ole loppua.
verses.king_james: Their land also is full of silver and gold, neither is there any end of their treasures; their land is also full of horses, neither is there any end of their chariots:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et repleta est terra ejus equis,  et innumerabiles quadrigæ ejus.  Et repleta est terra ejus idolis ;  opus manuum suarum adoraverunt,  quod fecerunt digiti eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּמָּלֵ֥א אַרְצ֖וֹ אֱלִילִ֑ים לְמַעֲשֵׂ֤ה יָדָיו֙ יִֽשְׁתַּחֲו֔וּ לַאֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשׂ֖וּ אֶצְבְּעֹתָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And their land is filled with horses: and their chariots are innumerable. Their land also is full of idols: they have adored the work of their own hands, which their own fingers have made.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heidän maansa on myös täynnä epäjumalia; he kumartavat käsialaansa, jotka heidän sormensa tehneet ovat.
verses.king_james: Their land also is full of idols; they worship the work of their own hands, that which their own fingers have made:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et incurvavit se homo,  et humiliatus est vir ;  ne ergo dimittas eis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשַּׁ֥ח אָדָ֖ם וַיִּשְׁפַּל־אִ֑ישׁ וְאַל־תִּשָּׂ֖א לָהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And man hath bowed himself down, and man hath been debased: therefore forgive them not.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siellä yhteinen kansa kumartelee, siellä sankarit heitänsä nöyryyttävät, joka et heille anna anteeksi.
verses.king_james: And the mean man boweth down, and the great man humbleth himself: therefore forgive them not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ingredere in petram, et abscondere in fossa humo  a facie timoris Domini, et a gloria majestatis ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בּ֣וֹא בַצּ֔וּר וְהִטָּמֵ֖ן בֶּעָפָ֑ר מִפְּנֵי֙ פַּ֣חַד יְהֹוָ֔ה וּמֵהֲדַ֖ר גְּאֹנֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Enter thou into the rock, and hide thee in the pit from the face of the fear of the Lord, and from the glory of his majesty.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mene kallioon, ja kätke sinuas maahan, Herran pelvon edestä, ja hänen kunniallisen majesteettinsa edestä.
verses.king_james: Enter into the rock, and hide thee in the dust, for fear of the Lord, and for the glory of his majesty.

verses.latin_vulgate: Oculi sublimes hominis humiliati sunt,  et incurvabitur altitudo virorum ;  exaltabitur autem Dominus solus  in die illa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֵינֵ֞י גַּבְה֤וּת אָדָם֙ שָׁפֵ֔ל וְשַׁ֖ח ר֣וּם אֲנָשִׁ֑ים וְנִשְׂגַּ֧ב יְהֹוָ֛ה לְבַדּ֖וֹ בַּיּ֥וֹם הַהֽוּא׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: The lofty eyes of man are humbled, and the haughtiness of men shall be made to stoop: and the Lord alone shall be exalted in that day.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä kaikki korkiat silmät alennetaan, ja jotka jaloimmat kansoissa ovat, täytyy itsensä notkistaa; sillä Herra on yksinänsä sinä aikana korkein.
verses.king_james: The lofty looks of man shall be humbled, and the haughtiness of men shall be bowed down, and the Lord alone shall be exalted in that day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia dies Domini exercituum  super omnem superbum, et excelsum,  et super omnem arrogantem,  et humiliabitur ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י י֞וֹם לַיהֹוָ֧ה צְבָא֛וֹת עַ֥ל כׇּל־גֵּאֶ֖ה וָרָ֑ם וְעַ֖ל כׇּל־נִשָּׂ֥א וְשָׁפֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because the day of the Lord of hosts shall be upon every one that is proud and highminded, and upon every one that is arrogant, and he shall be humbled.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Herran Zebaotin päivä käy kaiken koreuden ja korkeuden ylitse, ja kaikkein paisuneiden ylitse, että ne alennettaisiin,
verses.king_james: For the day of the Lord of hosts shall be upon every one that is proud and lofty, and upon every one that is lifted up; and he shall be brought low:

verses.latin_vulgate: et super omnes cedros Libani sublimes et erectas,  et super omnes quercus Basan,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַל֙ כׇּל־אַרְזֵ֣י הַלְּבָנ֔וֹן הָרָמִ֖ים וְהַנִּשָּׂאִ֑ים וְעַ֖ל כׇּל־אַלּוֹנֵ֥י הַבָּשָֽׁן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And upon all the tall and lofty cedars of Libanus, and upon all the oaks of Basan.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaikkein korkiain ja korotettuin sedrein ylitse Libanonissa, ja kaikkein tammein ylitse Basanissa;
verses.king_james: And upon all the cedars of Lebanon, that are high and lifted up, and upon all the oaks of Bashan,

verses.latin_vulgate: et super omnes montes excelsos,  et super omnes colles elevatos,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַ֖ל כׇּל־הֶהָרִ֣ים הָרָמִ֑ים וְעַ֖ל כׇּל־הַגְּבָע֥וֹת הַנִּשָּׂאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And upon all the high mountains and upon all the elevated hills.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin myös kaikkein korkiain vuorten ylitse, ja kaikkein korotettuin kukkulain ylitse,
verses.king_james: And upon all the high mountains, and upon all the hills that are lifted up,

verses.latin_vulgate: et super omnem turrim excelsam,  et super omnem murum munitum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַ֖ל כׇּל־מִגְדָּ֣ל גָּבֹ֑הַּ וְעַ֖ל כׇּל־חוֹמָ֥ה בְצוּרָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And upon every high tower, and every fenced wall.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja jokaisen korkian tornin ylitse, ja kaikkein vahvain muurein ylitse;
verses.king_james: And upon every high tower, and upon every fenced wall,

verses.latin_vulgate: et super omnes naves Tharsis,  et super omne quod visu pulchrum est,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַ֖ל כׇּל־אֳנִיּ֣וֹת תַּרְשִׁ֑ישׁ וְעַ֖ל כׇּל־שְׂכִיּ֥וֹת הַחֶמְדָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And upon all the ships of Tharsis, and upon all that is fair to behold.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin myös kaikkein haahtein ylitse meressä, ja kaiken kauniin käsialan ylitse;
verses.king_james: And upon all the ships of Tarshish, and upon all pleasant pictures.

verses.latin_vulgate: et incurvabitur sublimitas hominum,  et humiliabitur altitudo virorum,  et elevabitur Dominus solus  in die illa ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשַׁח֙ גַּבְה֣וּת הָאָדָ֔ם וְשָׁפֵ֖ל ר֣וּם אֲנָשִׁ֑ים וְנִשְׂגַּ֧ב יְהֹוָ֛ה לְבַדּ֖וֹ בַּיּ֥וֹם הַהֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the loftiness of men shall be bowed down, and the haughtiness of men shall be humbled, and the Lord alone shall be exalted in that day.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että kaikki ihmisten korkeus pitää notkistaman hänensä, ja nöyryyttämän itsensä, mitä ihmisessä korkiaa on; ja Herra yksin on silloin korkia oleva.
verses.king_james: And the loftiness of man shall be bowed down, and the haughtiness of men shall be made low: and the Lord alone shall be exalted in that day.

verses.latin_vulgate: et idola penitus conterentur ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָאֱלִילִ֖ים כָּלִ֥יל יַחֲלֹֽף׃
verses.douay_rheims: And idols shall be utterly destroyed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja epäjumalain pitää ratki hukkuman.
verses.king_james: And the idols he shall utterly abolish.

verses.latin_vulgate: et introibunt in speluncas petrarum,  et in voragines terræ,  a facie formidinis Domini  et a gloria majestatis ejus,  cum surrexerit percutere terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבָ֙אוּ֙ בִּמְעָר֣וֹת צֻרִ֔ים וּבִמְחִלּ֖וֹת עָפָ֑ר מִפְּנֵ֞י פַּ֤חַד יְהֹוָה֙ וּמֵהֲדַ֣ר גְּאוֹנ֔וֹ בְּקוּמ֖וֹ לַעֲרֹ֥ץ הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they shall go into the holes of rocks, and into the caves of the earth from the face of the fear of the Lord, and from the glory of his majesty, when he shall rise up to strike the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin mennään vuorten rotkoihin ja maan kuoppiin, Herran pelvon tähden, ja hänen kunniallisen majesteettinsa tähden, kuin hän nousee maata peljättämään.
verses.king_james: And they shall go into the holes of the rocks, and into the caves of the earth, for fear of the Lord, and for the glory of his majesty, when he ariseth to shake terribly the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: In die illa projiciet homo  idola argenti sui, et simulacra auri sui,  quæ fecerat sibi ut adoraret,  talpas et vespertiliones.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּיּ֤וֹם הַהוּא֙ יַשְׁלִ֣יךְ הָאָדָ֔ם אֵ֚ת אֱלִילֵ֣י כַסְפּ֔וֹ וְאֵ֖ת אֱלִילֵ֣י זְהָב֑וֹ אֲשֶׁ֤ר עָֽשׂוּ־לוֹ֙ לְהִֽשְׁתַּחֲוֺ֔ת לַחְפֹּ֥ר פֵּר֖וֹת וְלָעֲטַלֵּפִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: In that day a man shall cast away his idols of silver, and his idols of gold, which he had made for himself to adore, moles and bats.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin pitää jokaisen hopiaiset ja kultaiset epäjumalansa heittämän pois, jotka hän on teettänyt kumartaaksensa, myyräin ja yökköin kuvat,
verses.king_james: In that day a man shall cast his idols of silver, and his idols of gold, which they made each one for himself to worship, to the moles and to the bats;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ingreditur scissuras petrarum  et in cavernas saxorum,  a facie formidinis Domini,  et a gloria majestatis ejus,  cum surrexerit percutere terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָבוֹא֙ בְּנִקְר֣וֹת הַצֻּרִ֔ים וּבִסְעִפֵ֖י הַסְּלָעִ֑ים מִפְּנֵ֞י פַּ֤חַד יְהֹוָה֙ וּמֵהֲדַ֣ר גְּאוֹנ֔וֹ בְּקוּמ֖וֹ לַעֲרֹ֥ץ הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he shall go into the clefts of rocks, and into the holes of stones from the face of the fear of the Lord, and from the glory of his majesty, when he shall rise up to strike the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että he menevät kivien rakoihin ja vuorten rotkoihin, Herran pelvon tähden, ja hänen kunniallisen majesteettinsa tähden, kuin hän nousee maata peljättämään.
verses.king_james: To go into the clefts of the rocks, and into the tops of the ragged rocks, for fear of the Lord, and for the glory of his majesty, when he ariseth to shake terribly the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quiescite ergo ab homine,  cujus spiritus in naribus ejus est,  quia excelsus reputatus est ipse.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חִדְל֤וּ לָכֶם֙ מִן־הָ֣אָדָ֔ם אֲשֶׁ֥ר נְשָׁמָ֖ה בְּאַפּ֑וֹ כִּֽי־בַמֶּ֥ה נֶחְשָׁ֖ב הֽוּא׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Cease ye therefore from the man, whose breath is in his nostrils, for he is reputed high.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin lakatkaat siis ihmisestä, jonka sieramissa henki on; sillä ette tiedä, missä arviossa hän on.
verses.king_james: Cease ye from man, whose breath is in his nostrils: for wherein is he to be accounted of?
